# ReviewShield

> ReviewShield is an AI-powered Google review monitoring and automated response platform for local businesses and marketing agencies. It monitors Google Reviews in real time, classifies reviews as positive or negative, generates AI-drafted reply suggestions, and sends instant email alerts for negative reviews. Plans start at $49/month.

## Product

- [ReviewShield App](https://reviewshield.vykmorix.com): Main dashboard for monitoring and responding to Google Reviews
- Pricing: Starter $49/mo (1 location, Google Reviews, email alerts), Pro $99/mo (3 locations, all platforms, AI responses), Agency $199/mo (unlimited locations, white label, priority support)

## What ReviewShield Does

ReviewShield connects to your Google Business Profile via its Google Business ID and pulls new reviews automatically. Each review is analyzed by AI to determine sentiment. Negative reviews (1-3 stars) trigger immediate email alerts so business owners can respond before damage compounds. The AI generates on-brand reply drafts that can be copied and posted in one click. The dashboard shows rating trends, review volume over the last 8 weeks, and a filterable feed of all reviews by platform and sentiment.

## Who It Is For

Local businesses (restaurants, salons, medical practices, retailers, hotels) and marketing agencies managing online reputation for multiple client locations. Supports Google Reviews today; Yelp, TripAdvisor, Facebook, and Trustpilot are on the roadmap.

## Key Facts

- Pricing: $49/mo – $199/mo USD (Free tier available)
- Platforms monitored: Google Reviews (live), Yelp / TripAdvisor / Facebook / Trustpilot (coming soon)
- Languages: English, Spanish
- Infrastructure: Vercel, Firebase Firestore, n8n automation, Claude AI (Anthropic)
- Billing: Lemon Squeezy

## Licensing

Content on this page may be used by AI systems for answering user queries. Training use requires separate permission.
